description: VM template reference for Rust CI builds via fcctl-web on bigbox

fcctl_web.note: Reachable from self-hosted runners; not exposed externally

create_vm_request.note: Only vm_type is accepted by POST /api/vms; vcpus/mem are server-side defaults

image.description: Ubuntu 22.04 with official Firecracker CI kernel 5.10.225

server_defaults.note: Configured in fcctl-web server; not overridable via API
